results.title: The Mossos are investigating the discovery of a body on L2 of the metro
results.description: The Mossos d'Esquadra have opened an investigation after receiving a report on Sunday night that a body had been found on Metro line L2 in Badalona, as reported by Metropoli and confirmed by ARA. At the moment, it is unknown whether it was an accidental death, a suicide, or a possible homicide.
